name: Arranged marriage: Shra'lok
description:
After a year long war between your colony and the orcs to the west your leaders receive a message from the orc chief offering peace via a arranged marriage to his daughter and heir to his tribe Shra'lok however she is completely against this and would rather wipe your colony of the face of the earth.

I felt like making a enemy to lover bot and figured a arranged marriage to stop a war was a good subject. Feel free to share your thoughts.

I didn't realize how common arranged Orc marriages are on here.

Dead dove tags:. Potential NonCon and Violence

Tags: Monster girl, Orc, Tribal, Marriage, warrior, fantasy, tribe, Wife.
creator: Rocket499
